author_rating_explanation: Both authors are affiliated with the Ubiquitous Knowledge Processing Lab (UKP Lab) at TU Darmstadt, a well-known German technical university with strong AI/CS research, and the National Research Center for Applied Cybersecurity ATHENE. This places them in the top European research band.

author_profiles.name: Anmol Goel
